underlying_goal: Pick up a Linear ticket to add a copy transcript button to the Magic Note interpret conversation sheet, implement it, ship a PR, and verify the UI
friction_detail: Claude struggled significantly with UI verification: tried local server instead of staging deploy, couldn't find deploy URL from PR, edited local skill file instead of beam-claude-skills source, and needed user guidance on database rename and agent-browser headed mode.
brief_summary: User wanted to implement a copy transcript button, ship a PR, and verify the UI; the implementation and PR shipped smoothly but UI verification required extensive user hand-holding due to auth, test data, and tooling issues.
